company.name: Mahalaxmi Ayurveda
company.mission: To offer responsible, guidance-led Ayurvedic care with a primary focus on diabetes and metabolic health.
company.core_belief: True wellness comes from balance, consistency, and addressing root imbalances rather than just surface symptoms.
company.description: The company specializes in metabolic health because diabetes impacts multiple body systems, including digestion, energy levels, and detoxification. Their products are designed as Ayurvedic nutritional support to complement (not replace) prescribed medical care.

pillars.name: Natural Support
pillars.description: Working with the body's natural processes.

pillars.name: Root-Cause Focus
pillars.description: Addressing the source of health issues.

pillars.name: Guidance
pillars.description: Providing expert advice alongside their herbal formulations.

commitments: 10-day return policy for unused products in original packaging.

contact.address: A/P Shirol, Dist. Kolhapur, Maharashtra, India - 416103
